title: Billardiera heterophylla
taxonomy: Billardiera heterophylla is classified within the family Pittosporaceae. It belongs to the order Apiales. The family Pittosporaceae is a group of flowering plants native to Australia and New Zealand. This plant's classification also places it within the kingdom Plantae and the clade Angiosperms. The species is endemic to Australia, specifically in the eastern regions.
uses: Billardiera heterophylla, commonly known as the Purple Coral Pea, has been used in traditional medicine for its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. intro: Billardiera heterophylla, commonly known as Blueberry Ash or Blue Dasher, is a flowering plant species native to eastern Australia. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and respiratory issues.
